name: Mexican Omelet with Chicken
keywords: eggs main dish mexican poultry vegetables
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the chicken or turkey into small chunks.
2. In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs, water, salt, and pepper until well combined.
3. Add the tomato, chili powder, instant chicken bouillon, and 1 cup of the cooked chicken to the egg mixture. Stir gently until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
4. Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Once hot, add the chopped chicken and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
5. Pour the egg mixture into the skillet, spreading it evenly. Cook for 2-3 minutes or until the bottom is set but not fully cooked through.
6. Add the remaining cup of cooked chicken to the omelet.
7. Sprinkle the top with margarine or butter.
8. Fold the omelet in half and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, or until the eggs are fully set.
9. Turn off the heat and serve immediately.
